hints.description: This global media and information services company operates in two main segments: News Media and Digital Real Estate Services. Its News Media segment publishes and distributes news and information across various platforms, including newspapers, websites, and digital subscriptions, featuring titles like The Wall Street Journal and the Times. The Digital Real Estate Services segment, through Move, Inc., operates real estate websites like ***** and provides related services.
hints.funFact1: Ru**** Murdoch, a prominent figure in the media landscape, has been the Chairman and CEO of the company since its formation in 2008, having previously led its predecessor companies for decades.
hints.funFact2: The company was created through the spin-off of the publishing assets of ***** from its entertainment assets, which were combined to form *****.
